title: The Spirit and the Flesh
writer: Alessandro Manzoni, Mario Camerini, Ivo Perilli
actors: Gino Cervi, Dina Sassoli, Ruggero Ruggeri
plot: Lumbardy, Italy, seventeenth century. Renzo and Lucia's love story is jeopardized by Don Rodrigo, a wicked nobleman, who is interested in Lucia. When she refuses his attentions he has her kidnapped and brought to a convent whose p...
